PRODUCT DESIGN
NFC CASSETTE FIGURE

Cassette-shaped NFC figurine that plays music on tap — built end-to-end with generative AI. From consumer insight to 3D model to animation. Three material expressions: gold, marble, plastic.

The Insight In an era of AI-generated everything, creators crave tactile objects that signal identity. The cassette is a physical key to a digital world.
Gold · Marble · Plastic 4-angle 3D Model Animation
View Full Case Study ↗
Building & Learning

AI EXPLORATION

01
Product Design × AI
CASSETTE NFC FIGURE
— PHYSICAL AI PRODUCT

Used generative AI (Flora AI) in Stanford design coursework to prototype a cassette-shaped NFC figurine that plays music on tap. Developed end-to-end: consumer insight → concept → 3D render → animation.

Flora AI · 3D Render · NFC · Stanford Design Coursework
02
Productivity × AI
BUILDING WITH AI TOOLS
— FROM ZERO TO SHIPPED

Built two products using AI-native tools — no engineering background required. Used Lovable AI to design and ship a product landing page (Stanford coursework). Built this portfolio site using Stitch AI. Both projects went from brief → deployed product within days.

Lovable AI · Stitch AI · Stanford Product Coursework
03
Agentic AI
OPENCLAW
— PERSONAL AI AGENT

Independently set up and customized OpenClaw on AWS Lightsail — a self-hosted agentic AI pipeline. Explored multi-step workflows, tool integrations, and autonomous task execution. Daily user of Claude and ChatGPT for research synthesis, messaging, and product thinking.
